title: helichrysum profusum
intro: Helichrysum profusum, also known as the Mountain Curry plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum profusum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
